URL: https://github.com/ClementTsang/bottom
Language: rust
Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: astral-sh/ruff
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff
Language: rust
An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbt-labs/dbt-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core
Language: rust
dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: denoland/deno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/denoland/deno
Language: rust
A modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fish-shell/fish-shell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fish-shell/fish-shell
Language: rust
The user-friendly command line shell.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ai-project/git-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ai-project/git-ai
Language: rust
A Git extension for tracking the AI-generated code in your repos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleworkspace/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli
Language: rust
Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juspay/hyperswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juspay/hyperswitch
Language: rust
Open source, composable payments platform | PCI compliant | SaaS and Self-host options | Enables connectivity to multiple payment, payout, fraud, vault and tokenization providers | Uplifts authorization with intelligent routing and revenue recovery | Reduce payment processing costs with cost observability | Reduces payment ops with reconciliation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kata-containers/kata-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kata-containers/kata-containers
Language: rust
Kata Containers is an open source project and community working to build a standard implementation of lightweight Virtual Machines (VMs) that feel and perform like containers, but provide the workload isolation and security advantages of VMs. https://katacontainers.io/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lencx/ChatGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT
Language: rust
🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ogulcancelik/herdr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr
Language: rust
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: risingwavelabs/risingwave
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/risingwavelabs/risingwave
Language: rust
Event streaming platform for agentic AI. Continuously ingest, transform, and serve event streams in real time, at scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruffle-rs/ruffle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk
Language: rust
An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wezterm/wezterm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wezterm/wezterm
Language: rust
A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer written by @wez and implemented in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: windmill-labs/windmill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/windmill-labs/windmill
Language: rust
Open-source developer platform to power your entire infra and turn scripts into webhooks, workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (13x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Retool and Temporal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xingkongliang/skills-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xingkongliang/skills-manager
Language: rust
A lightweight desktop app to manage, sync, and organize AI agent skills across 15+ coding tools — Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, and more.
